campaign.name: Voltcraft — Festival Season Activation
campaign.message: All night. Every set. Zero crash.
campaign.targetAudience: Gen Z and younger millennials 18-29, festival-goers, EDM and indie scene, energy drink and adaptogen-curious
campaign.tone: high-energy, neon, electric, night-scene cinematic, vibrant gradients, motion-blur kinetic

products.name: Voltcraft Surge — Tropical Storm
products.description: 200mg natural caffeine from green tea, 1g L-theanine, electrolyte blend, real fruit juice. Zero sugar, zero crash, festival-ready 12oz can.

products.name: Voltcraft Glow — Berry Lightning
products.description: Adaptogen-powered berry energy drink with ashwagandha, B-vitamin complex, real berry juice. Designed for sustained energy through long sets.
